channel.title: Pipewire on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Pipewire on Arrans github.io

item.title: quickshell-mirror/quickshell
item.description: Flexible toolkit for making desktop shells with QtQuick, for Wayland and X11

item.title: wwmm/easyeffects
item.description: Limiter, compressor, convolver, equalizer and auto volume and many other plugins for PipeWire applications
